title: Fnaf Recalled
description:
Adds Original Fnaf Animatronics Created by PenguinMinerGman

With Textures and Animations done by mrsirsquishy
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75b3167d6e7ea6a9e0b2adc2a0927759fed012ce.png)
**Requires GeckoLib 1.19.2 To Work

Recommended that you use alongside the Fnaf Mod To better create your own Fnaf Stuff

**This Addon is not official and in no way affiliated with the mod**

[The Fnaf Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-five-nights-at-freddys-mod)

This is an Addon Mod For the Fnaf Mod Which adds four new animatronics Poppy The Pug, Penny The Penguin, Billy The Goat, and Spring Chicken/Helen with Nighttime roaming versions along with daytime versions that just stand in place. The main theme is that these are animatronics from other Freddy locations that were tested to see if the characters would be popular. They are broken down and ready to be transported back to Hurricane Utah where the original Freddy's location is.

Credits:
Models Made by me
Textures and Animations Done by MrSirSquishy
Fnaf Mod Credits:
Rashibald for pizzeria blocks textures (Walls, Wall Tiles and Floor Tiles, The Lockers) 
Beph and Mephilis for The Desk Models and Textures 
Rashi for the Labelled Arcades  
Beph and Mephilis for the other Arcades 
ItsIdyllic for the balloons and presents
![Won't support Bedrock](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/cast-iron-skillet2/Shithead@aa40fd16fbdddff65d6a99787b54a49ab63856b1/icons/wont_support_bedrock.svg)
